alert_supplement-table: If you want to supplement the table, go to it and use the upload dialog.
alert_name-already-exists: Node with this name already exists
context_append-to-end: Append content of the file to the end of the destination
context_first-row-as-names: Interpret first row as column names
context_second-row-as-types: There is row with types right before data-rows
confirm_overwrite-data: Are you sure you want to overwrite all existing data rows with the ones from the uploading file?
alert_file-size-exceeded: File size must not be greater than {{maxSize}}
